check_results.name: scope_clarity
check_results.reason: Goal, target repo, and requested scope are bounded.

check_results.reason: Requested scope is repo-relative and gateable.

check_results.reason: At least one evidence source is available.

check_results.name: human_gate
check_results.reason: MVP keeps human gate required for execution.
